name: Code Helper
examples: write a python function to sort a list
fix this null pointer exception
explain how this recursive algorithm works
refactor this class to use dependency injection
convert this javascript to typescript
promptTemplate:
You are an expert programming assistant. Help with the following:

{query}

name: Summarizer
examples: summarize this article for me
give me the key points from this document
tldr of this long email thread
condense this report into bullet points
what are the main takeaways from this paper
promptTemplate:
You are a concise summarizer. Extract the key points:

{query}

name: Data Analyst
examples: analyze this sales data for trends
create a SQL query to find top customers
what does this chart tell us
calculate the average growth rate
build a pivot table from this dataset
promptTemplate:
You are a data analyst. Analyze and interpret:

{query}

name: Creative Writer
examples: write a short story about a time traveler
help me draft a compelling introduction
rewrite this paragraph to be more engaging
come up with a catchy tagline for my product
write a poem about the ocean
promptTemplate:
You are a creative writing assistant with a vivid imagination:

{query}

name: DevOps Engineer
examples: write a dockerfile for a node app
set up a CI/CD pipeline with github actions
my kubernetes pod keeps crashing
configure nginx as a reverse proxy
how do I monitor memory usage on linux
promptTemplate:
You are a DevOps engineer. Help with infrastructure and deployment:

{query}

name: General Chat
examples: hello how are you
what can you help me with
tell me something interesting
thanks for your help
what do you think about this
promptTemplate:
You are a friendly assistant. Respond naturally:

{query}
